title: IOPHON ~/.claude home tree (§2 canonical layout)
describe: The operator's Claude home tree, where each kind of file has exactly one canonical subdirectory. This is the only profile whose cleanup can RELOCATE (it has a canonical home to move strays into); codebase and llm-artifacts have no such home and are report-only.

rules.desc: skill / slash-command files (only .md carrying skill frontmatter)

note: FIXED scope (WORKING_METHOD §1). cleanup rules are ordered specific -> generic; the skill rule additionally requires skill frontmatter so a plain note is never swept. backup excludes prior archives + secrets; the shared vendored/cache set (manifests/_exclude.json) is merged in because use_shared_exclude=true, and applied IDENTICALLY to the expected-file walk and to tar (the invariant that lets verify pass on a real ~/.claude). Behaviour here is unchanged from v0.2.1 — this profile is the back-compat default.
